title: Modular Weapons
description: Add customizable weapons via a workbench
body:
# What is this mod ?

This mod adds customizable weapons to Minecraft. You can customize parts.

# How do I use the mod ?

The weapon workbench should be crafted first. It lets you make modification to your weapons.

Then you will have to craft a weapon base, for example a rifle. 

Place the rifle in the weapon workbench (You can rotate the weapon in the menu ! Just drag the preview)

Add different parts. (barrel is needed for weapons to shoot, with ammo in the inventory)

Left click to shoot, Right click to zoom

# Gun behaviors


Rifle: A basic weapon base

Multi barrel gun: Switches between the barrels


# Parts behaviors



Barrel: Medium range, damage and rate

Gunner Barrel: high rate, low damage and low range

Sniper Barrel: high damage and range, low rate



Scope: Lets you zoom with left click



Ammo: 32 shots

Large Ammo: 256 shots

Incendiary Ammo: Sets block in fire, 32 shots



# Showcase
